description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 7, 2026 at 6:51 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Redwood City, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on Hopkins Avenue near El Camino Real. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northeastbound in the right lane on Hopkins Avenue when a passenger car traveling northwestbound in a 
parking lot adjacent to 602 El Camino Real exited the parking lot without stopping and began to turn left onto southwestbound Hopkins 
Avenue. The passenger car entered the Waymo AV’s lane of travel, and the Waymo AV maneuvered to the left as the passenger car 
continued turning left, and the front right side of the passenger car made contact with the rear right side of the Waymo AV. At the time of 
the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
